case_title: DAVID EPSTEIN RESPONDENT VS. GOODMAN'S PAINTING APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF MAR-03-2004 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF WED., 03MAR2004 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JASON JUNGRAIS. JUDGE: JUDGE PRO TEM JASON JUNGRAIS; REPORTER: NOT REPORTED; CLERK: MARJORIE MANZELLA (D525, WED., 03MAR2004).

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT EPSTEIN, DAVID RECOVER FROM APPELLANT GOODMAN'S PAINTING $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,022.00, SEE SCANNED DOC NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED

GUDMUN MYRDAL DBA GUDMUN'S PAINTING FOR $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL AND $0.00 ATTORNEYS FEES AND $22.00 COSTS. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. PRO TEM JUDGE JASON JUNGREIS; REPORTER: NOT REPORTED; CLERK: MARJORIE MANZELLA (D-525, WED., 03MAR2004).
